input.content:
hardcoded_language_learning_report
  issue "659"
  decision "awaiting_human_review"
  promotion_gate "hardcoded_language_fixture_context_gate_and_agent_cli_e2e_pass"
  record_type "agent_cli_auto_learning"
  substrate "links_network"
  retention_formula "reads + writes + incoming_links + outgoing_links"
  expression_count "10"
  validation_warning_count "0"
  multi_hop_seed "observation:sentence-only-gap"
  multi_hop_recall "observation:sentence-only-gap"
  learned_expression_01
    id "observation:sentence-only-gap"
    text "message
user
The first scanner detected punctuated sentences but missed unpunctuated phrases in format, push-string, and return output positions required by issue 659."
    reads "11"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "12"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_02
    id "observation:existing-debt"
    text "message
user
After merging current main, the sentence inventory contained 774 admitted source literals; context-sensitive phrase detection exposed 548 additional existing rows."
    reads "9"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "10"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_03
    id "observation:new-debt"
    text "message
user
A source literal absent from the committed inventory must fail before it can silently become a user interface."
    reads "8"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "9"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_04
    id "observation:stale-debt"
    text "message
user
An inventory row whose source literal disappeared hides completed migration unless the same gate rejects stale rows."
    reads "7"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "9"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_05
    id "observation:seed-duplication"
    text "message
user
Eight engine response fallbacks duplicated multilingual answers already available through the seeded response lookup."
    reads "6"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "8"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_06
    id "observation:lexer-noise"
    text "message
user
Comments, character literals, trace slugs, and code fragments are not user-facing language and must not inflate the migration inventory."
    reads "5"
    writes "1"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "0"
    retention_score "7"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=message|role=user"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_07
    id "lesson:context-sensitive-detection"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Classify punctuation-bearing sentences globally, then admit unpunctuated multi-word phrases only when lexer context proves an output-producing position.
observation:lexer-noise"
    reads "0"
    writes "5"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "6"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_08
    id "lesson:two-way-ratchet"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Compare detected and admitted sets in both directions so new debt and stale debt both fail and the inventory can only shrink honestly.
observation:stale-debt"
    reads "0"
    writes "4"
    incoming_links "1"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "6"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_09
    id "lesson:seed-first-migration"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Replace duplicated source prose with meaning or intent lookups into seed data, then regenerate the inventory to prove an actual burn-down.
observation:seed-duplication"
    reads "0"
    writes "3"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "4"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
  learned_expression_10
    id "lesson:review-gated-self-hosting"
    text "learning_amendment
assistant
Run the audit-learning task through Formal AI behind a real external Agent CLI, preserve the transcript, and require human review before promoting amendments.
lesson:two-way-ratchet"
    reads "0"
    writes "2"
    incoming_links "0"
    outgoing_links "1"
    retention_score "3"
    qualifiers "conversation_id=issue-659|kind=learning_amendment|role=assistant"
    validation "aligned"
